app_tagline: Set up an AI coding agent, safely.
wizard_welcome_body: This wizard sets up everything you need to use an AI coding agent on your PC.
disk_required: Cowork needs at least {gib} GiB of free disk space.
fallback_probe: This string exists only in English to verify base-locale fallback.
wizard_agents_body: Pick one or more AI coding agents to install.
wizard_agents_min_hint: Select at least one agent to continue.
runner_reboot_body: Your PC needs to restart to continue. Cowork will resume automatically after it restarts.
runner_active_hint: This can take a few minutes. Please keep this window open.
error_blocker_body: Setup can't continue on this PC.
error_needs_action_body: Please fix the issue above, then try again.
error_transient_body: A temporary problem occurred. Retrying automatically.
error_internal_body: An unexpected error occurred. You can retry or report it.
auth_body: Select an agent to start its login in the terminal below, then follow the on-screen steps.
ws_folder_hint: Folder: {path} · name can be changed later
ws_delete_body: {name} and its files at {path} will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.
